idea-plugin.name: Copy Path for Agent
idea-plugin.description:
Copy Path for Agent

Copy file and folder references from JetBrains IDEs in configurable agent-friendly formats. Use switchable profiles for Claude Code, Codex App, and custom templates.

  • Editor selections include line numbers based on the selected text.
  • Multiple carets generate one reference per caret.
  • Project tree multi-selection copies all selected files and folders.
  • Each profile keeps its own template and multiple-reference separator.
  • Profiles can be switched quickly from the status bar.
  • Templates use a small generic variable set for paths, directories, file names, line numbers, line ranges, and local file URIs.
  • The Codex App profile uses Markdown file links that render as clickable file references in Codex.

Built-in Profiles

ProfileOutput
Claude Code@src/utils/auth.ts#L42-68
Codex App[auth.ts](/absolute/path/src/utils/auth.ts:42-68)

How to Use

  • Editor context menu - Right-click in any editor and choose Copy Path for Agent.
  • Project tree context menu - Right-click any file or folder in the Project tool window and choose Copy Path for Agent.
  • Keyboard shortcut - Press Alt+C (Option+C on macOS).

Settings

Settings - Tools - Copy Path for Agent

  • Profile - Switch between built-in and custom profiles.
  • Template - Customize the copied reference with documented variables.
  • Multiple references separator - Stored per profile.
  • Notification - Toggle copy notifications and set their duration.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.3

  • Changed the Codex App built-in profile to output Markdown file links that render as blue clickable file references in Codex.
  • Kept the link label to the file name and put the selected line or line range in the link target.
  • Fixed a status bar profile switching crash on IntelliJ Platform builds where final popup choice is represented as null.
  • Added optional template sections such as {{#startLine}}#L{startLine}{{/startLine}} so default profiles do not leave dangling line markers when no line is available.
  • Reduced template variables to the minimal generic set: paths, directories, file name, line numbers, line range, and local file URI.
  • Removed derived variables such as file extension, extensionless file name, quoted paths, readable line text, and preformatted line suffixes.
  • Built-in profiles now compose Codex App and Claude Code output from the same generic variables.
  • Renamed the built-in profiles to Claude Code and Codex App.
  • Removed the preset selector from settings; profiles now directly own their templates.
  • Renamed the status bar widget text to Copy Profile.
  • Kept editor selection, multi-caret, multi-file, folder, separator, shortcut, and notification features.

action.description: Copy file path references with configurable agent templates
